BRANCH.COMMENT: If GldOriginatorID is NULL se it to 0

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get the contacts for this vendor

MAP.COMMENT: A little error checking on Originator ID

INVOKE.COMMENT: Log that supplier failed to save

LOOP.COMMENT: Should only be 1 saved originator at a time but best to loop over list

Values.value: Received the XosGenericXmlOriginatorsSaveResponse xml from Express Link successfully.
Received the XML from CYENCE for the Originators successfully.
